scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:bootstrap && pnpm run dev:watch
scripts.dev:bootstrap: pnpm --filter @omi/core build && pnpm --filter @omi/protocol build && pnpm --filter @omi/store build && pnpm --filter @omi/provider build && pnpm --filter @omi/memory build && pnpm --filter @omi/extensions build && pnpm --filter @omi/prompt build && pnpm --filter @omi/settings build && pnpm --filter @omi/agent build
